svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="Zve-U0i5oCPXLyYKPYHV"> <mxGraphModel dx="1808" dy="550" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant Handler as DestroyMovimientoHandler
 participant Aggregate as Movimiento
 participant Repo as EloquentMovimientoRepository
 participant EventBus as LaravelEventBus
 participant RevertH as MovimientoDeletedFinancialImpactEventHandler
 participant DestroyH as DestroyAttachmentsWhenMovimientoIsWrittenEventHandler
 participant AuditH as AuditoriaEventHandler

 Handler->>Repo: findById(MovimientoId)
 Repo-->>Handler: $movimiento (reconstituted)
 Handler->>Aggregate: $movimiento->delete()
 Aggregate->>Aggregate: recordThat(new MovimientoDeleted($copy))
 Aggregate-->>Handler: $movimientoWithEvent

 Handler->>Repo: delete($movimientoWithEvent)
 Repo->>Repo: Soft delete (deleted_at)
 Repo->>EventBus: publishMany($movimiento->releaseEvents())
 Note over EventBus: [MovimientoDeleted]
 EventBus->>RevertH: Revert financial impact on Cuenta
 Handler->>EventBus: publish(AttachmentsForMovimientoDeleted)
 EventBus->>DestroyH: Delete files from storage
 Handler->>EventBus: publish(AuditableActionOcurred)
 EventBus->>AuditH: Persist audit record",
 "config": null
